title: Opava, Moravia-Silesia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Opava is a city in Moravia-Silesia with a population of 56,000. A historic Silesian city with a beautiful main square, rich cultural heritage, and a strong university presence in the Moravia-Silesia region.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
